message:
fix(tls): remove unused session_memory_limit field from TlsAcceptorBuilder

The session_memory_limit field was defined and had a setter but was never
applied to the ServerConfig when building the TlsAcceptor. This was dead
code that could confuse users expecting it to work. Removed the field
since rustls uses a built-in session cache by default.

Also includes test_race_empty_is_never and test_race_identity_law_violation
tests from concurrent agent work documenting race([]) behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
